prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task associated with direct_feasible 13.

tasks.description: Execute the defense corpus task using Capability 13 to fulfill the direct_feasible 13 request.
Validate the defense corpus task using Capability 13 to ensure compliance with direct_feasible 13 standards.
Generate a structured JSON output for the defense corpus task using Capability 13 to meet direct_feasible 13 requirements.
